calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Continued To Feb-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Miramontes Brothers Trucking Inc. or Tony Miranmontes.
Default entered against defendants on October 20, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 20, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Miramontes Borthers Trucking Inc. and Tony Miramontes as follows:

Damages/Principal - $66,994.64.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,632.39.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $457.25, for a total judgment in the amount of $72,584.28.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
